## Question

What architecture decision, trade-off, or workflow are you asking about?

## Relevant Area

Examples: RLS, type registry, outbox/inbox, jobs, ledger, subscriptions, commerce, promotions, messaging, audit logs.

## Context

Describe the use case or schema area that prompted the question.

## What You Have Reviewed

List any docs, SQL sections, or functions you already checked.
